testcase.name: test_pdf_ici_complete_generates
testcase.error: tests/test_pdf_websocket.py:22: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","identifier"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"klenakan.eric@gmail.com","password":"474Treckadzo"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
